channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: Blaizzy / mlx-vlm
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 3,588 → 3,639 (+51) | Ranked #1
MLX-VLM is a package for inference and fine-tuning of Vision Language Models (VLMs) on your Mac using MLX.
Language: Python 343 stars today

item.title: onyx-dot-app / onyx
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 24,203 → 24,346 (+143) | Ranked #2
Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM
Language: Python 1,197 stars today

item.title: Yeachan-Heo / oh-my-codex
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 15,589 → 15,765 (+176) | Ranked #3
OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.
Language: TypeScript 1,789 stars today

item.title: siddharthvaddem / openscreen
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 19,652 → 20,262 (+610) | Ranked #4
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
Language: TypeScript 1,591 stars today

item.title: telegramdesktop / tdesktop
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 30,827 → 30,851 (+24) | Ranked #5

item.title: block / goose

item.title: microsoft / agent-framework
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 8,691 → 8,737 (+46) | Ranked #7

item.title: sherlock-project / sherlock
